sources.title: Oklahoma Kid 1939 Bogart
sources.description: Humphrey Bogart plays an outlaw in a western (for a change (it's only 1 of 3))with a god heart (1 of 3 movies with Cagney).

metadata.Plot: McCord's gang robs the stage carrying money to pay Indians for their land, and the notorious outlaw "The Oklahoma Kid" Jim Kincaid takes the money from McCord. McCord stakes a "sooner" claim on land which is to be used for a new town; in exchange for giving it up he gets control of gambling and saloons. When Kincaid's father runs for mayor, McCord incites a mob to lynch the old man whom McCord has already framed for murder..
metadata.Writer: Warren Duff, Robert Buckner, Edward E. Paramore Jr.
metadata.Actors: James Cagney, Humphrey Bogart, Rosemary Lane
